data.text: Added `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/multi-model-review.spec.ts` as a TDD seed for the quorum review UI flow. Six cases cover dispatch dialog, per-arm rendering, majority/unanimous rollup, drill-in, and streaming. All cases are `test.fixme`'d (the view per PRD §437 isn't built yet) so the file parses, lists in Playwright, and CI stays green; markers come off as the view lands. Committed in `45be78cb`.
